context_for_next_testing_agent: Zero-Redirect Protocol fully implemented. strategic_console_state table is now authoritative for calibration completion routing. Q9 completion and brain COMPLETE both write is_complete=true to strategic_console_state. All three status endpoints (/api/calibration/status, /api/lifecycle/state, /api/onboarding/status) check this table FIRST before falling back to user_operator_profile.
